differential_diagnoses: Obesity Hypoventilation Syndrome with severe obstructive sleep apnea
next_steps: Serum protein electrophoresis (SPEP/UPEP) with immunofixation and serum free light chains
Echocardiogram with global longitudinal strain imaging to screen for infiltrative cardiomyopathy
Acetylcholine receptor (AChR) antibody and MuSK antibody testing
Repetitive nerve stimulation (RNS) and needle electromyography (EMG)
Pulmonary function tests including maximal inspiratory and expiratory pressures (MIP/MEP)
Continuous inpatient pulse oximetry and capnography monitoring
Lumbar puncture for protein/cytology to rule out paraneoplastic or inflammatory processes
